entities.name: MILLETS
entities.description: Nutritious group of crops grown in drylands, targeted for trait improvement via gene editing

entities.name: DRYLANDS
entities.description: Regions where millets are primarily grown and support small-holder farmers

entities.name: CRISPR/CAS-MEDIATED GENE EDITING
entities.description: Technology enabling targeted insertions and deletions at specific gene sequences for trait improvement

entities.name: BASE EDITING
entities.description: A precise gene editing advancement that allows modifications at the nucleotide level

entities.name: PRIME EDITING
entities.description: A precise gene editing advancement that allows modifications at the nucleotide level

entities.name: AGRONOMICAL PROPERTIES
entities.description: Characteristics of millet crops that can be improved through the modification of genic regions

entities.name: GRNA DESIGNING TOOLS
entities.description: Tools used for designing guide RNAs as part of the gene editing toolbox in millets

entities.name: CAS NUCLEASES
entities.description: Proteins used as part of the gene editing toolbox to create double-strand breaks in DNA

entities.name: PROMOTERS
entities.description: Regulatory DNA sequences used to drive the expression of gene editing components in millets

entities.name: GENOMIC INFORMATION
entities.description: Sequence data and genomic knowledge required to target specific genes for editing

entities.name: PLANT TRANSFORMATION METHODS
entities.description: Techniques used to introduce gene editing tools into plant cells

entities.name: TRAIT IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of enhancing desirable characteristics in crops using biotechnology
